sections.title: C: Original key word transformation practice
sections.instructions: Complete the second sentence so that it keeps the same meaning as the first.

items.sentence:
Mia began the class project before the lesson on Units 37, 38 and 39. **AFFORD**
The class project ...... before the lesson on Units 37, 38 and 39.

Leo began the study group before the lesson on Units 37, 38 and 39. **PRETENDED**
The study group ...... before the lesson on Units 37, 38 and 39.

Sara began the exam workshop before the lesson on Units 37, 38 and 39. **MADE**
The exam workshop ...... before the lesson on Units 37, 38 and 39.

Tom began the online lesson before the lesson on Units 37, 38 and 39. **DECIDED**
The online lesson ...... before the lesson on Units 37, 38 and 39.

Nina began the school club before the lesson on Units 37, 38 and 39. **MANAGED**
The school club ...... before the lesson on Units 37, 38 and 39.

Oscar began the revision session before the lesson on Units 37, 38 and 39. **AVOID**
The revision session ...... before the lesson on Units 37, 38 and 39.
